title: Cobblemon Legends: Z-A
description: Pokémon Legends: Z-A sounds and musics for Cobblemon!
body:
Bring the Spirit of Pokémon Legends: Z-A to Cobblemon!

Enhance your Cobblemon adventures with the iconic atmosphere of Pokémon Legends: Z-A. This specially crafted resource pack perfectly captures the futuristic energy of Lumiose City, replacing Minecraft’s in-game soundtrack with unforgettable tracks from the game. Experience your world like never before, enriched with the mystery and modern charm of a reborn Kalos.

Disclaimer

All music tracks in this pack are from Pokémon Legends: Z-A.
Copyright for these songs belongs to Nintendo, The Pokémon Company, and Game Freak.
